grace_period.source_quote:
i.Grace Period of 15 days would be available for monthly installment mode. 
ii.Grace Period of 30 days would be available for all other installment mode.

free_look_period.source_quote:
You/the Insured Person shall be allowed a period of thirty days from date of receipt of the Policy document to 
review the terms and conditions of the Policy

initial_waiting_period_days.source_quote:
Expenses related to the treatment of any illness within 30 days from the first policy commencement date shall 
be excluded

pre_existing_disease_waiting_months.source_quote:
of a pre-existing Disease (PED) and its direct complications shall be 
excluded until the expiry of 36 months of continuous coverage after the date of inception of the first policy

pre_hospitalization_days.source_quote: Pre-Hospitalization Medical Expenses incurred up to 60 days prior to Hospitalization

post_hospitalization_days.source_quote: Post Hospitalization Medical Expenses incurred during a period up to 90 days after Hospitalization

day_care_treatments_count.source_note: Per insurer baseline (IFFCO Tokio family health insurance covers 380+ day care surgeries)

network_hospital_count.source_note: 8,000+ Network Hospitals ('Why Choose IFFCO-TOKIO' section, scraped 2026-05-15)

co_payment_pct.source_quote:
The following Co-pay options are available under the product:  
10%, 20% or 25% .

policy_term_options_years.source_quote:
The policy period shall be upto a maximum of 3 years (1 year/ 2 years/ 3 years) as specified in the 
policy schedule.

ayush_coverage.source_quote:
AYUSH hospitalization expenses Incurred in AYUSH Hospitals or AYUSH Day Care Centres. Coverage also includes 
pre- hospitalization and post hospitalization expenses.

maternity_coverage.source_quote:
Maternity Expenses (Code - Excl18): 
i. Medical treatment expenses traceable to childbirth

organ_donor_expenses.source_quote: Hospitalization expenses of person donating an organ during the course of organ transplant subject to the above sub-limits applicable to the Insured Person and within the sum insured.

domiciliary_treatment.source_quote: Domiciliary Hospitalization means medical treatment for an illness/disease/injury which in the normal course would require care and treatment at a hospital but is actually taken while confined at home under any of the following circumstances: i.

worldwide_emergency_cover.source_quote:
All medical treatment for the purpose of this insurance will have to be taken in India only and all claims shall be  
payable in Indian currency.

preventive_health_checkup.source_quote: Health check-up: Insured Person(s) shall be entitled to undergo a periodic medical checkup upon renewal of the policy. This benefit is dependent on the Basic sum insured of the policy.

cashless_treatment_supported.source_quote:
Cashless facility means a facility extended by Us to the Insured Person where the payments, of the costs of 
treatment

no_claim_bonus_cap_pct.source_quote: subject to a maximum of 100% (of basic sum insured of the expiring policy

geographic_coverage.source_quote:
All medical treatment for the purpose of this insurance will have to be taken in India only and all claims shall be  
payable in Indian currency.

room_rent_capping.value: 2% of SI per day or single private AC room (default); variant plans cap to 1.5%/1.25% per day in metro/non-metro cities
room_rent_capping.source_quote: Room Rent expenses A limit of 2% of the sum insured on per day basis or charges of a Single Standard Air-Conditioned Room, whichever is less I. In respect of class “A” cities, a limit of 1.50% of the sum insured on per day basis or actual, whichever is less. II.

no_claim_bonus_pct.source_quote: The Cumulative Bonus shall be increased by 25% of the basic sum insured for the first claim-free Policy Year
